hooks.command: N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] Invoke the reqall:context skill with project_name=$N: (1) upsert the project using EXACTLY name=\"$N\", (2) search reqall for context relevant to this prompt, (3) list open records for this project. Skip impact unless the prompt involves changing existing tracked work."

N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] Invoke the reqall:persist skill to classify and persist ALL work done in this session. Use project_name=\"$N\" when calling reqall:upsert_project. Create a record for each distinct work item and link related records."

N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] A planning subagent completed. Save this plan as a spec record. Call reqall:upsert_project with name=\"$N\", then reqall:upsert_record with kind=spec, status=open, the plan title, and full plan as body."
